entry.title: New IDC AIDOAAI1500004 awarded to CHEMONICS INTERNATIONAL, INC for the amount of $25,000

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: GLOBAL HEALTH SUPPLY CHAIN (GSHC) -PROCUREMENT AND SUPPLY MANAGEMENT (PSM) SINGLE AWARD IDIQ IGF::OT::IGF

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ADMINISTRATIVE MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL MANAGEMENT CONSULTING SERVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
